data.content: Implementation complete. Changed Tabs className from 'flex flex-col h-full' to 'flex flex-col flex-1 min-h-0' so it takes available space but can shrink. Added shrink-0 to Separator and SheetFooter to prevent them from collapsing below the overflow-hidden clip boundary. Single file change (settings-sheet.tsx), 3 lines changed. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, build). Branch: worktree-foolery-3bcc-settings-footer, commit: 4d09452132fc.
